debug_info.goal:
case pos
ι : Type u_1
𝕜 : Type u_2
V : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : DecidableEq ι
inst✝⁴ : Field 𝕜
inst✝³ : LinearOrder 𝕜
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing 𝕜
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝ : Module 𝕜 V
s : Finset ι
x y : ι → V
hy : ∀ i ∈ s, y i ∈ (convexHull 𝕜) (x '' (↑s \ {i}))
hs : s.Nontrivial
z : V
c : ι → 𝕜
hc₀ : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 ≤ c i
hc₁ : ∀ i ∈ s, c i ≤ 1
hz : ∀ i ∈ s, (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = z
hc : ∀ i ∈ s, c i = 1
i : ι
hi : i ∈ s
⊢ (↑(s \ {i}).card)⁻¹ • ∑ x_1 ∈ s \ {i}, x x_1 = y i

failed_attempts:
have hx : ∀ j ∈ s, x j = z := fun j hj ↦ by simpa [hc j hj] using hz j hj
      have hsi : (s \ {i}).Nonempty := by
        obtain ⟨j, hj, hji⟩ := hs.exists_ne i
        exact ⟨j, mem_sdiff.2 ⟨hj, hji⟩⟩
      rw [sum_congr rfl fun j hj ↦ hx j (mem_sdiff.1 hj).1, sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul,
        inv_smul_smul₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 hsi.card_ne_zero)]
      have : x '' (s \ {i}) = {z} :=
        (Set.image_congr fun j hj ↦ hx j (mem_sdiff.1 hj).1).trans
          (Set.image_const (Finset.coe_nonempty.2 hsi) z)
      rw [this, convexHull_singleton, mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      exact (hy i hi).symm
